fato_historico: 1762: Former emperor Peter III of Russia is murdered.
energia_do_dia: Today invites you to release heavy burdens from the past, much like the quiet turning of a page in an old imperial chronicle. It is a good time to let go of what no longer serves your spirit. Perhaps you may find renewed luck blooming like a four-leaf clover as you step into your authentic, expansive power with grace.
frase_do_dia: Your bright spirit is the compass that guides you toward beautiful new horizons.
significado_numero: A powerful cycle representing fresh beginnings and sudden spiritual awakenings.
conselho: Trust your intuition and follow the path that brings you genuine joy.
